name: quandora-staging
description: Staging Quandora plugin for pre-release agent workflow testing.

interface.shortDescription: Use staging Quandora services from your agent.
interface.longDescription: Quandora Staging packages pre-release service skills in one plugin. Factor Mining is the first skill and helps agents test staging tasks, sessions, factor source submission, backtests, artifact retrieval, and result summaries.
defaultPrompt: Use Quandora Staging Factor Mining to show public tasks.
Use Quandora Staging Factor Mining with my custom factor idea.
Use Quandora Staging Factor Mining to resume a run and summarize results.
